artPrompt: A prim human inspector in a drab municipal coat leans over a folding table, magnifying glass raised, scrutinizing a plate of sad pastries with one eyebrow arched, a blank illegible citation pad tucked under one arm. Towering filing cabinets and humming lights frame the petty drama. The figure fills the lower frame, glow rising behind. Wide 4:3 landscape, cool ivory-and-cyan palette, oppressive stillness, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Snack Permit Inspector
text: When Snack Permit Inspector enters the battlefield, if a snack is present at the table (real or referenced by another card), you gain 2 life and the snack's owner gains nothing, citation pending.
flavorText: The Mayor's free snacks were, it turns out, never zoned for distribution.
